name: wealthview-pro
description: WealthView.pro read-only Stellar treasury intelligence platform.

scripts.check: npm run build && node --check app/api/aggregate/route.js && node --check app/api/signals/route.js && node --check app/api/intelligence/route.js && node --check api/aggregate.js && node --check api/signals.js && node --check api/intelligence.js && node --check lib/stellar.js && node --check lib/intelligence.js && node --check mcp-server.js && node --check public/wealthview-static.js && test -f public/index.html && test -f public/styles.css
scripts.bundle: zip -r wealthview-deploy-bundle.zip app api lib public package.json next.config.mjs vercel.json README.md DEPLOY_NOW.md .gitignore mcp-server.js mcp.json agent.json CNAME favicon.ico -x '.git/*' 'node_modules/*' '.next/*' 'dist/*' '.env*' '.vercel/*'
